title: Formal verification of field arithmetic (Aeneas + Kani)
description:
Two-track formal verification for field arithmetic in `gfp/` and `gfpn/`:

- **Track 1 (Aeneas)**: Translate Rust→Lean4 via Charon/Aeneas, prove field axioms and algorithm correctness against Mathlib typeclasses. Universal proofs for any prime P.
- **Track 2 (Kani)**: Bounded model checking for machine-arithmetic edge cases (overflow, representation bounds, bit manipulation).

See `dev/plans/formal_verification.md` for full rationale and detailed plans.
